headline: 1 Profitable Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Ignore

headline: The Coming Power War That Will Define the AI Era
summary: Electricity is emerging as the critical strategic resource of the AI era, creating a global competition among governments, hyperscalers, and infrastructure owners for scarce AI-grade power capacity.
